hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-rf\s+[^(node_modules|dist|build|coverage|__pycache__|.cache|.next|.turbo)]|DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE)|TRUNCATE|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+push\s+-f|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+checkout\s+\.)' && echo 'WARN: Destructive command detected. Review carefully before approving.' >&2 || true
